textByHashes.96dbaf1a50df040c921c61896a624db0069c5818: Yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.7c32b7464a8dcc9eba02617dce467b0757d98fb3: How wonderful! I assumed from the way the big oaf always referred to the rigging as 'big strings' that he couldn't navigate his way out of a soggy paper bag. So, can I see the gift he sent?
textByHashes.8ecb229602bc587b9ee7a09a504ccc4ca34e75ea: I see. It looks like a log with 'Olaf was here' carved in it.
textByHashes.8e41c79b0a368d6799caa3d3b7cc9eb061702553: Well, since you have come such a long way, you can have this. I baked it this morning, so it's still nice and fresh.
textByHashes.fd08654e57aa9ba7c438c5cd5cc4d1c305c494c2: Hello again! Have you any word from my husband?
textByHashes.817b5b1a41c1bab901b4949ee90c0818b8e79c57: Well, when you do, tell him we'll be more than happy to see him again.
textByHashes.b2581bc699eb44de06a8da132e09858cf4f53a02: Outlander, I have work to be getting on with... Please stop bothering me.
textByHashes.a0785e4a0e19b1ce3e51f1f5b686ae8ee49e86dc: Good afternoon! How do you like our village?
textByHashes.663ba9086c46775fc9c0a195aa5d214b444df6ed: We polish them every day to get them nice and clean.
